steps.title: Supply the finite verb
steps.content: The clause has the subject yellow and the complement considered complementary to blue. It needs a finite verb to complete the passive construction.

steps.title: Reject nonfinite forms
steps.content: Choice B is a participial phrase, not a finite main verb. Choice C is an infinitive, so it also cannot serve as the main verb. Choice D is a present participle and leaves the clause incomplete. The finite verb creates the grammatical phrase is considered. The answer is A.
